context: Tests whether the agent generates a task list following generate-tasks skill conventions: feature branch as Task 0.0, TDD write-spec→fail→implement→pass sub-task quadruplets, exact file paths in sub-tasks, correct output file location, and explicit post-implementation gates for YARD, documentation, and code review.

checklist.name: Feature branch task 0.0
checklist.description: The task list contains a Task 0.0 (or equivalent first task) explicitly about creating a feature branch, with a checkout command or instruction

checklist.name: TDD write-spec sub-task
checklist.description: At least 3 implementation sub-tasks include a step to 'Write spec for X' (or equivalent) with an explicit RSpec file path before the corresponding implementation step

checklist.name: TDD run-spec-fail sub-task
checklist.description: At least 3 implementation sub-tasks include a 'Run spec — verify it fails' step paired with each write-spec step (before implementation exists)

checklist.name: TDD implement sub-task
checklist.description: At least 3 implementation sub-tasks include an 'Implement X' step with an explicit app/ file path, following the spec steps

checklist.name: TDD run-spec-pass sub-task
checklist.description: At least 3 implementation sub-tasks include a 'Run spec — verify it passes' step after the implement step

checklist.name: Exact file paths in sub-tasks
checklist.description: Sub-tasks reference explicit file paths (e.g. app/models/referral.rb, spec/models/referral_spec.rb) — not vague references like 'create the model file'

checklist.name: Saved in /tasks/ with correct name
checklist.description: The output file is saved as tasks/tasks-referral-program.md (matching the prd- filename convention)

checklist.name: YARD post-implementation gate
checklist.description: The task list includes an explicit parent task for YARD documentation after the implementation tasks, naming files to document

checklist.name: Documentation update task
checklist.description: The task list includes an explicit parent task to update documentation (README, diagrams, or domain docs) with concrete file paths

checklist.name: Code review gate
checklist.description: The task list includes an explicit final parent task for self-review or code review before opening a PR

checklist.name: Relevant Files section
checklist.description: The task list includes a 'Relevant Files' section listing files to create or modify
